description_long: This object represents a human figure dressed in a dark, formal uniform, with a light-skinned face and short blond hair. The uniform consists of a black jacket and matching pants, with a white shirt visible at the collar. The figure's limbs and torso are highly distorted, appearing elongated and angular, with exaggerated, sharp extensions that deviate from natural human proportions. The shoes are dark and formal, matching the rest of the attire, and the overall appearance suggests a security guard in a stylized or glitched form. No visible accessories such as hats, badges, or equipment are present, and the uniform lacks any clear insignia or patches.
description: A distorted human figure in a black security uniform with a white shirt and dark shoes, featuring exaggerated, angular limbs and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face, white shirt collar, and the most pronounced angular extensions of the arms and legs.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the elongated, sharp extensions of the arms and legs, with the head and upper torso partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the back of the uniform and the extreme angularity of the limbs, with the head barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the profile of the head and the sharp, extended limbs, with the body posture appearing highly unnatural.
attribute_uniform_type: A formal black security uniform consisting of a black jacket and pants with a white shirt collar visible, no tie or hat, and no visible standardization or insignia.
attribute_posture: Standing with limbs dramatically extended and angular, creating a tense and unnatural stance.
